query:
SELECT a.id, a.name, a.email, a.consultorId
FROM alunos a
INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT alunoId FROM assessment_pdi) ap ON ap.alunoId = a.id
WHERE a.isActive = 1 AND a.consultorId IS NULL;
